sources.citation: Goodfellow et al. Deep Learning. MIT Press, 2016.
Stanford CS231n: Deep Learning for CV, 2024.
Vaswani et al. Attention Is All You Need. NeurIPS, 2017.

learning_objectives: L1: Identify neuron components: weights, bias, activation function.
L1: Name three activation functions and state where each is used.
L1: Define forward pass, backward pass, and gradient descent in NN training.
L1: State the purpose of conv layers, pooling layers, and FC layers in a CNN.
L2: Explain how backpropagation computes gradients using the chain rule.
L2: Describe the vanishing gradient problem and how ReLU and BatchNorm address it.
L2: Explain how Transformer self-attention computes query-key-value representations.
L3: Design a CNN architecture for image classification and justify each choice.
L3: Diagnose overfitting from loss curves and propose three remediation strategies.

concepts.title: The Artificial Neuron
concepts.explanation: output = activation(Σ wᵢxᵢ + b). Sigmoid: (0,1), binary output, vanishing gradients in deep nets. Tanh: (−1,1), zero-centred. ReLU: max(0,z), fast, default hidden. Softmax: multi-class output.

concepts.title: Layers and Forward Pass
concepts.explanation: Forward pass: compute predictions layer by layer. Loss: MSE for regression, cross-entropy for classification.
concepts.worked_example: MNIST: 784→128 ReLU→64 ReLU→10 Softmax. Forward pass outputs probability over 10 digit classes.

concepts.title: Chain Rule and Vanishing Gradients
concepts.explanation: ∂L/∂w₁ via chain rule. Sigmoid derivatives ≤0.25 — gradients shrink exponentially. Fix: ReLU, skip connections, BatchNorm.
concepts.worked_example: 2-layer sigmoid: 0.2→×0.25=0.05→×0.25=0.0125. After 10 layers: ~0.000002. With ReLU: 0.2 unchanged.

concepts.title: Regularisation and BatchNorm
concepts.explanation: Dropout: zero fraction p neurons during training. L2: adds λ‖w‖². BatchNorm: normalise layer inputs within mini-batch — ~3–5× faster convergence.
concepts.worked_example: Without BatchNorm: activations span [0.001,1000]. With BatchNorm: each layer input ~N(0,1).

concepts.title: CNN Architecture
concepts.explanation: Conv: K filters F×F detect local patterns. Pool: reduces spatial size. Pattern: [Conv→ReLU→Pool]×N → Flatten → FC → Softmax. Transfer learning: ImageNet weights, replace FC, fine-tune.

concepts.title: Self-Attention Mechanism
concepts.explanation: Q=XWᴼ, K=XWᴷ, V=XWᵛ. Attention(Q,K,V)=softmax(QKᵀ/√dₖ)V. Each token attends all others. Multi-head: h parallel heads. Block = multi-head attn + LayerNorm + FFN + residuals.
concepts.worked_example: 'The cat sat': 'cat' attends The(0.2), cat(0.5), sat(0.3) — contextual mix. No vanishing gradient across distance.

concepts.title: Diagnosing Overfitting
concepts.explanation: Train low / val high and diverging → overfitting. Both high → underfitting. Remedies: more data, dropout, L2, early stopping, reduce capacity, BatchNorm.
concepts.worked_example: Train 99%, val 72% at epoch 15. Add dropout(0.5)+augmentation → train 96%, val 91%. Gap: 27%→5%.
